message:
feat(fwc): wire CommandEnvelope into all dispatch functions and fix resilience.rs compilation

Wire CommandAvailability semantics across 66 return points in 30+ dispatch
functions (schema, examples, template, validate, export-tools, suggest,
invoke, context, doctor, status, budget, pin, unpin, rollout, config,
install, update, cancel, history, capabilities). Host-backed commands use
LiveRuntime, offline catalog commands use OfflineArtifact.

Fix fcp-host resilience.rs compilation errors where ResilienceLayer::ensure_connector
referenced non-existent self.entries and self.config (should be
self.health_router.entries and self.config.health).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
